title: Feed Discovery, URL Identity, Scope, and SSRF Boundary · Go Semantics Case: Feed Go Ssrf Resolution
summary: Users can submit arbitrary URLs, discovery follows every alternate link, redirects change authority silently, and hostname checks occur only before DNS resolution. Predict the reader decision, feed or API contract, Go and PostgreSQL ownership, bounded failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the feed go ssrf resolution increment in authorized feed discovery and network-scope policy. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theo…
objectives: Restrict schemes, ports, redirects, resolved addresses, proxy behavior, and re-resolution to block private, local, metadata, and rebinding targets.
Normalize only justified URI components while preserving distinctions that can identify different publisher resources.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
